notes: One Parquet file each for DimPlayers and DimMachines. FactPlays is written as separate Parquet files per PlayCalendarDate.

schema.title: DimPlayers
schema.description: Slowly Changing Dimension Type 2 for players.

fields.name: PlayerKey
fields.description: Internal surrogate key used in the datamart; FactPlays joins to this.

fields.name: PlayerIdNK
fields.description: Player card ID from the operational system; represents one real person over time. This does not change when demographics change.

fields.name: Gender
fields.description: Gender recorded at enrollment; used for basic segmentation and comparisons.

fields.name: Age
fields.description: Age in years at enrollment; useful for grouping players into age bands.

fields.name: LoadTimestampUtc
fields.description: When this version of the player row was loaded into the datamart; used for lineage and troubleshooting.

fields.name: EffectiveStartDatetime
fields.description: Point in time when this version of the player record became valid.

fields.name: EffectiveEndDatetime
fields.description: Point in time when this version stopped being valid (if current record it’s set to 2100-01-01).

fields.name: IsCurrent
fields.description: 1 if this is the current version of the player, 0 if it’s a historical version.

schema.title: DimMachines
schema.description: Slowly Changing Dimension Type 2 for physical machines.

fields.name: MachineKey
fields.description: Internal surrogate key; FactPlays joins to this to find the correct machine configuration.

fields.name: SerialNumberNK
fields.description: Business identifier for the physical cabinet (e.g., WFS-1234); does not change when settings change.

fields.name: Denomination
fields.description: Value of one credit on the machine in USD (e.g., $0.05 – Nickel, $0.25 – Quarter, $1.00 – Dollar).

fields.name: PayoutPercent
fields.description: Long-term return-to-player (RTP) as a fraction (e.g., 0.90 ≈ 90%); lower values increase casino hold.

fields.name: PositionId
fields.description: Identifier for the machine’s spot on the floor (ties back to the floorplan).

fields.name: BankId
fields.description: Identifier for the bank of machines this position belongs to.

fields.name: DesirabilityTier
fields.description: 1–4 score for how desirable the position is, with 4 being the most desirable location based on management's estimates.

fields.name: IsActive
fields.description: 1 if this machine configuration is currently in use on the floor, 0 if not. Entire machines may be removed from the floor over time due to damage or normal wear.

fields.name: ThemeId
fields.description: Numeric identifier for the theme currently loaded on this machine.

fields.name: ThemeName
fields.description: Human-readable name of the theme; what players see on the cabinet.

fields.name: ImageUrl
fields.description: URL to an image representing the theme, mainly for reporting.

fields.name: LoadTimestampUtc
fields.description: When this version of the machine row was loaded into the datamart.

fields.name: EffectiveStartDatetime
fields.description: When this configuration (denom, payout, theme, position, etc.) became valid.

fields.name: EffectiveEndDatetime
fields.description: When this configuration stopped being valid (e.g., after a move or re-theme).

fields.name: IsCurrent
fields.description: 1 if this row is the current machine configuration, 0 if it’s historical.

schema.title: FactPlays
schema.description: Fact table at the atomic grain of a single pull/spin.

fields.name: playIdNK
fields.description: Unique identifier for each spin in the slot management system; ensures one row per spin.

fields.name: PlayerKey
fields.description: Foreign key to DimPlayers; links the play to the player.

fields.name: MachineKey
fields.description: Foreign key to DimMachines; links the play to the specific machine configuration at that moment.

fields.name: PlayCalendarDate
fields.description: Calendar date of the play; also the partition key and basis for day-level analysis. This is generally connected to a date dimension for reporting.

fields.name: PlayTimeOfDay
fields.description: Time of day for the play; used to analyze hourly or intraday patterns.

fields.name: BetCredits
fields.description: Number of credits wagered on that spin (e.g., 1–10); multiplied by Denomination to get money wagered.

fields.name: BetAmount
fields.description: Actual currency wagered on that spin (BetCredits × Denomination); usually what we mean by 'play' or 'coin-in' for that pull.

fields.name: WinAmount
fields.description: Amount of money returned to the player on that spin.

fields.name: NetAmount
fields.description: WinAmount − BetAmount; negative values are profit for the casino on that spin, positive values are loss.

fields.name: LoadTimestampUtc
fields.description: When this batch of plays (for a given date) was loaded into the datamart.
